finding: 11-node repro: Group>Circles>1st left copy{Circle 6 (factoryID=12 shape) + Clone B copy 21 (factoryID=15 clone) + <mask Image Mask factoryID=1>}. f10-f18 diverge ~6.1 dB uniformly: FCP masks the clone to the circle (a concentric RING); the ENGINE drops the GROUP-level Image Mask (parser extracts imageMaskSourceId only on <scenenode>, not <group>/<layer>) so it renders unmasked full-frame clone instead of the ring. Fix = wire imageMaskSourceId on group/layer parse (see docs/notes/salvage/group-image-mask-parser.patch) AND apply a group-level mask in the compositor (index.ts renderChildLayers; currently masks only leaf-drawables at :478).
